name: Papua (Indonesia)

colors.symbolism: the golden provincial coat of arms

description: A navy field bearing the golden coat of arms of the Province of Papua at the centre — distinct from the Morning Star (Bintang Kejora) flag of West Papuan independence aspirations, whose display is banned by the Indonesian government.
history: Used by the Provincial Government of Papua. The Indonesian central government distinguishes this provincial flag from the Morning Star flag (which is internationally recognised as a Papuan independence symbol but its display is illegal in Indonesia).

features.role: Coat of arms of the Province of Papua
